title: Astonish Shake & Fresh Carpet Freshener, Eliminates Odours, Pink Blossom, 3 x 350g
features: Freshen up Carpets: Using Shake & Fresh is the ultimate solution for maintaining a clean and inviting home environment
Neutralises Odours: Say goodbye to stale odours, lingering pet smells and musty scents that can accumulate in your carpets over time
Multipack: This pack of 3 allows you to clean for longer! Our 3 pack means you can keep stocked up and always ready to go
Easy to Use: Shake over your carpet, wait a few minutes then vacuum to remove carpet odours
Refreshing Scent: Revitalise your carpets with this floral scent of pink blossom
description: Product Description Here at Astonish we are proud of our products. Whatever your cleaning problem we aim to have a helpful cleaning solution, even when it comes to personal care. Now we’re not saying that we can work miracles, let’s be realistic cleaning can on occasions be hard work, but we’ve taken the time to ensure we’ve developed products that get the job done right, nothing less. Freshen up your carpets with the Shake & Fresh. Over time stale odours, lingering pet smells and musty scents can accumulate in your carpets. Combat these odours with Shake & Fresh and its Malodour Control Technology, leaving your carpets fresh with a citrus fragrance. Our easy-to-use format requires little effort, simply shake, wait a few minutes, and vacuum away – that’s cleaning made easy. Ingredients Dolomite, Calcium Carbonate, Fragrance, Silicon Dioxide Directions Shake on the carpet, wait a few minutes and then vacuum to remove odors from the carpet. See more
